testcase.name: test_create_ticket_public
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter41_buyer_pro_registry.py:178: in test_create_ticket_public assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"create ticket: {r.status_code} {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: create ticket: 404 {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in (200, 201) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
